properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every drop of blood that touched the ground Cried Jesus saves, Jesus saves. A world of sin rejoiced to hear the sound Jesus saves, Jesus saves.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hallelujah am redeemed I've been pardoned full and free, All because the blood still speaks, Jesus saves, Jesus saves.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even the spear that pierced His side Cried Jesus saves, Jesus saves. The message of His Arms scretched open wide Cried Jesus saves, Jesus saves.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All the Host of heaven now proclaims Jesus saves, Jesus saves. And in the book of life besides my name is Jesus saves, Jesus saves.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We have heard the joyful sound Jesus saves, Jesus saves. Spread the tidings all around, Jesus saves, Jesus saves.
